𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧_𝗔𝗨𝗥𝗔 | To build a DIY, ESP32-S3 powered air quality monitoring station with a graphical user interface and smart home integration.  🔥 Super Hot!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 C 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To build a DIY, ESP32-S3 powered air quality monitoring station with a graphical user interface and smart home integration.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Professional telemetry: PM0.5/PM1/PM2.5/PM4/PM10, CO, CO2, VOC, NOx, temperature, humidity, absolute humidity (AH), pressure, HCHO.
✅ No soldering required: designed for easy assembly using Grove/QT connectors.
✅ Smooth LVGL UI with night mode, custom themes, and status indicators.
✅ Integrated web dashboard with live state, charts, events, settings sync, DAC page, and OTA firmware update.
✅ Easy setup: Wi-Fi AP onboarding + mDNS access.
✅ Home Assistant ready: automatic MQTT discovery.
✅ Optional DAC control (GP8403, 0-10V): manual levels/timer plus automatic demand mode.
✅ Robust Safe Boot: automatic rollback to the last-known-good config after crashes.


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 366 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 30 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Project Aura AQ is an open-source ESP32-S3 based air quality station featuring a touch-friendly LVGL UI, local web setup, and MQTT integration for Home Assistant. It provides comprehensive air quality telemetry and is designed for easy assembly by makers.

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/21cncstudio/project_aura

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗥𝗗𝗡 | A modern, retro-inspired terminal file manager for efficient file navigation and operations.  🔥 Super Hot!

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A modern, retro-inspired terminal file manager for efficient file navigation and operations.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Two-panel interface
✅ DOS-accurate color theme
✅ File operations (copy, move, delete, mkdir)
✅ Built-in file viewer (text/hex)
✅ Quick search
✅ File selection by pattern
✅ Sorting options
✅ Hidden files toggle
✅ Built-in Tetris game
✅ Trash support

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

rdn is a terminal-based file manager written in Rust, inspired by the classic Dos Navigator. It offers a two-panel interface, essential file operations, and a retro DOS-accurate color theme, aiming to bring a familiar orthodox file manager experience to modern terminals.

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗔𝗜-𝗦𝗗𝗞-𝗧𝗢𝗢𝗟𝗦 | To provide developers with a suite of tools and utilities to enhance the development, debugging, and deployment of AI applications built with the Vercel AI SDK.  🔥 Super Hot!

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide developers with a suite of tools and utilities to enhance the development, debugging, and deployment of AI applications built with the Vercel AI SDK.
📅 Created: Sep 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✅ AI chat state management
✅ Development tools for debugging AI applications
✅ Stream structured, type-safe artifacts from AI tools
✅ Multi-agent orchestration
✅ Universal caching for AI SDK tools
✅ Persistent memory system for AI agents


❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This TypeScript package provides essential utilities for building production-ready AI applications using the Vercel AI SDK. It offers solutions for state management, debugging, structured streaming, intelligent agents, caching, and persistent memory, aiming to streamline AI development.

𝗡𝗔𝗡𝗢-𝗣𝗗𝗙 | Editing PDF documents, including text, images, and slide content, through intuitive natural language commands.  🔥 Super Hot!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Editing PDF documents, including text, images, and slide content, through intuitive natural language commands.
📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

✅ Natural Language Editing
✅ Add New Slides
✅ Non-Destructive Editing (OCR Re-hydration)
✅ Multi-page & Parallel Processing


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Nano PDF Editor is a Python-based command-line tool that allows users to edit PDF documents using natural language prompts. It leverages Google's Gemini 3 Pro Image model to understand and execute edits, preserving the original text layer through OCR re-hydration.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗜𝗢𝗧𝗛𝗔𝗖𝗞𝗕𝗢𝗧 | Comprehensive security testing and vulnerability assessment of Internet of Things (IoT) devices and embedded systems.  📈 Growing!

📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

IoTHackBot is an open-source toolkit for IoT security testing, offering a suite of command-line tools and AI-assisted Claude Code skills for discovering vulnerabilities in devices, firmware, and applications. It facilitates network reconnaissance, device-specific testing, firmware analysis, and Android app examination.
